evidence: "I love horror movies and will sit through even most bad ones in search of a scare."
"The whodunit isn't rocket science, but with some luck you might make it to the end surprised."
"Generic, perhaps with some slightly better acting from a few of the cast."
"Fun premise, terrific cast, kept you guessing...more than adequate escapism."
"Everything about this series is excellent - story, casting, acting, writing, sets, historical accuracy."
"Well acted, eerily atmospheric, genuinely creepy, with characters you believe."
"Josh Radnor and Mary Elizabeth Winstead, both remarkable actors, have incredible on-screen chemistry."
"That Andrew Lincoln has not been showered with industry awards is criminal."
"Creepy and sad, but not structured very well."
"Adorable for kids and adults. Well voice."
"Everything about this series is excellent - story, casting, acting, writing, sets, historical accuracy."

summary: The user enjoys horror, drama, and thrillers, with a preference for fast-paced narratives that are well-acted and produced. They appreciate emotional depth and quality in storytelling, indicating a strong engagement with character-driven plots.
